message:
test(frankenterm-core): add DECOM, erase, and tab stop conformance fixtures

Add 6 new fixtures exercising origin mode (DECOM), erase operations,
and custom tab stops:

- modes/decom_cup_relative: CUP addressing relative to scroll region
- modes/decom_save_restore: save/restore preserves cursor in DECOM context
- esc_sequences/full_reset_clears_decom: ESC c clears region+modes
- erase/ed_erase_above: ED mode 1 erases everything above cursor
- erase/el_erase_left: EL mode 1 erases from line start to cursor
- tab_stops/custom_tab_stops: clear defaults, set custom stops, tab through

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_erase_above",
+  "description": "ED mode 1 erases everything above cursor position (all prior rows + current row up to cursor)",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344451b5b323b3148464748494a1b5b323b33481b5b314a",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE at row 0, CUP(2,1) → (1,0), print FGHIJ at row 1, CUP(2,3) → (1,2), ED(1) erases: all of row 0 + row 1 cols 0-2; I(1,3) and J(1,4) survive; cursor at (1,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 3, "char": "I" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "J" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "el_erase_left",
+  "description": "EL mode 1 erases from start of line to cursor position (inclusive)",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142434445464748494a1b5b313b35481b5b314b",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDEFGHIJ fills row 0, CUP(1,5) → (0,4), EL(1) erases cols 0-4 (inclusive); F-J at cols 5-9 survive; cursor at (0,4)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": "J" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
